message:
feat(demo_showcase): implement WizardPage multi-step deployment workflow

Add WizardPage module for demonstrating huh form integration patterns:
- ServiceType enum: WebService, BackgroundWorker, ScheduledJob options
  with display names and descriptions
- Environment enum: Development, Staging, Production targets
- EnvVar struct for environment variable configuration
- Placeholder WizardPage struct replacing PlaceholderPage

Update pages/mod.rs:
- Export wizard module and WizardPage type
- Change Pages struct wizard field from PlaceholderPage to WizardPage
- Update Default impl to construct WizardPage::new()

This lays the groundwork for a realistic "Deploy a Service" workflow
demonstrating multi-step form wizards with validation and progress
tracking, following the pattern established in bd-1ynf design doc.

Note: repro_textinput_word_delete.rs and target/ are not committed
as they appear to be debugging artifacts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
